title: senecio lapidum
intro: Senecio lapidum, also known as stonecrop, is a succulent plant species that belongs to the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Senecio lapidum include its ability to reduce fever, treat skin conditions, and provide relief from respiratory issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil to harness its medicinal properties, and it is also used topically to treat wounds and skin irritations.
